briefdescription.para: Access the block map as an array of 32-bit words.
Union allowing access to the block map as an array of 32-bit words or as bitfields.
A bitmask structure for mapping code flash blocks.

detaileddescription.para: This structure provides a bitfield representation for the code flash blocks, allowing individual blocks to be selected for operations like write protection. Each bit from b000 to b106 corresponds to a specific code flash block.
Setting a bit to '1' in a mask selects that block for an operation.
